packet_artifact_name: BHSM Phase Three-C Analytical Working Packet
public_status: BHSM v1.0.1 status-reconciled release: internal boundary no-fit package complete/exported; external empirical comparison layer separate/open.
recommended_status_language: BHSM now has a candidate 4D field dictionary and vertex-source map: internal BHSM boundary coefficients, mixing matrices, neutral operators, and holonomy phases can be mapped to candidate collider-field targets with explicit provenance. The map does not yet constitute production FeynRules/UFO readiness because vector/fermion normalizations, full gauge/Lorentz structures, mass-width schemes, and renormalization conventions remain open.
